title: Defense Doctrine — defensive retrieval governance laboratory (claim-limit discipline)
public_claim: A defensive-RAG governance doctrine whose first job is to stop immature security claims from inflating themselves.
distinctive_mechanism: Every claim must carry mission profile, attacker tier, objective class, evidence packet, current boundary, residual risk, and downgrade triggers before it can mature through C1 Designed, C2 Implemented, C3 Validated, C4 Adaptively Stress-Tested, C5 Operationally Sustainable, and C6 Externally Defensible stages, with NIST AI RMF, NIST SP, and Google SAIF-style controls as reference discipline.
